title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App
scenario: Find My Device screen fails to update after granting location permission via "Enable Now" when "Don't Allow" was selected during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the onboarding flow, selecting "Don't Allow" when prompted for location permission.
2. Navigate to App Settings → Find My Device.
3. Tap "Enable Now" on the Find My Device screen.
4. When the system location permission dialog appears, select "While Using the App".
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The location permission dialog is dismissed and the Find My Device screen is displayed.
